site_meta_description.title: Default Meta Description
site_meta_description.description: Default meta description for public pages without item-specific SEO.

site_meta_keywords.title: Default Meta Keywords
site_meta_keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords for pages without item-specific keywords.

site_og_title.title: Default Open Graph Title
site_og_title.description: Social share title when a page does not set its own. Falls back to the site display name.

site_og_image.title: Default Open Graph Image URL
site_og_image.description: Absolute URL to the default social share image (recommended 1200×630).

site_twitter_card.title: Twitter Card Type
site_twitter_card.description: Default Twitter card layout for public pages.

site_head_extra.title: Additional Head Markup
site_head_extra.description: Extra meta, link, or script tags inserted before </head> on public pages.

allow_ai_crawlers.title: Allow AI Crawlers
allow_ai_crawlers.description: When disabled, common AI user-agents are disallowed in robots.txt.

ai_crawler_policy.title: AI Crawler Policy Note
ai_crawler_policy.description: Optional comment appended to robots.txt describing AI indexing policy.
